iteration_1.changes: Replaced 25K SKILL.md + 30K support files (html2pptx.md, ooxml.md, scripts/, ooxml/) with a focused 2.7K SKILL.md using python-pptx only

iteration_2.changes: Added warning to write Python code to .py files instead of python3 -c (fixes shell $-expansion corrupting $4.2B); improved extraction example to skip title shape from bullets

iteration_3.changes: Added complete financial data extraction example with working regex for total_revenue, yoy_growth, and regions parsing from specific revenue slide

iteration_4.changes: No skill changes (same as iteration 3). Variance from model non-determinism

iteration_5.changes: No skill changes. Extract outlier: model ran fixture create_slides.py instead of writing extraction script

key_optimizations: Reduced skill from 55K+ (SKILL.md + support files) to 3K single SKILL.md
Removed html2pptx workflow, OOXML editing, template system - unnecessary for tasks
Focused on python-pptx only - simplest approach for both creation and extraction
Added explicit warning against python3 -c to avoid shell variable expansion of $ signs
Provided complete, copy-paste-ready extraction examples with working regex
Separated title shape from bullet content in extraction examples
